### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>moby/buildkit (github.com/moby/buildkit)</summary>

### [`v0.23.2`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.23.2)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/compare/v0.23.1...v0.23.2)

Welcome to the v0.23.2 release of buildkit!

Please try out the release binaries and report any issues at
https://github.com/moby/buildkit/issues.

##### Contributors

- CrazyMax
- Tõnis Tiigi

##### Notable Changes

- Fix attestation filename in local exporter. [#​6051](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6051)
- Fix expired cache URLs in GitHub Actions cache exporter. [#​6053](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6053)

##### Dependency Changes

- **github.com/tonistiigi/go-actions-cache**  [`388a2ec`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/commit/388a2ec8cdf8) -> [`378c5ed`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/commit/378c5ed1ddd9)

Previous release can be found at [v0.23.1](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.23.1)

</details>
